title: 語順（倒置）・省略・強調
fullTitle: 第15章　語順（倒置）・省略・強調

problems.question: Never (　　) I dream of making a fortune by investing in the stock market.
problems.ja: 株式市場に投資して財産を築くなどとは，夢にも思わなかった。
problems.en: Never did I dream of making a fortune by investing in the stock market.

problems.question:
我々は，彼がその試合に負けるなどとは思ってもみなかった。（１語不要）
(　　) (　　) (　　) (　　) (　　) he would lose the game.
(think / did / that / little / we / no)
problems.rawAnswer: Little did we think that（no不要）
problems.ja: 我々は，彼がその試合に負けるなどとは思ってもみなかった。（１語不要）
problems.en: Little did we think that

problems.question:
今ほど緊張したことはこれまでになかった。
At (been / have / I / more nervous / no / time) than I am now.
problems.rawAnswer: no time have I been more nervous
problems.ja: 今ほど緊張したことはこれまでになかった。
problems.answer: no time have I been more nervous
problems.en: At no time have I been more nervous than I am now.

problems.question:
労働者は賃上げを要求するだけでなく，労働時間の削減も望んでいる。
Not (a pay increase / do / only / the workers / want), but they also want reduced hours.
problems.rawAnswer: only do the workers want a pay increase
problems.ja: 労働者は賃上げを要求するだけでなく，労働時間の削減も望んでいる。
problems.answer: only do the workers want a pay increase
problems.en: Not only do the workers want a pay increase, but they also want reduced hours.

problems.question:
最近になってようやく，親の教えの大切さがわかった。
Only (have/ I / importance / lessons / my / of / parents' / realized / recently / the).
problems.rawAnswer: recently have I realized the importance of my parents' lessons
problems.ja: 最近になってようやく，親の教えの大切さがわかった。
problems.answer: recently have I realized the importance of my parents' lessons
problems.en: Only recently have I realized the importance of my parents' lessons.

problems.question:
そのオペラはイタリア語で公演され，私には一言もわからなかったし，そのストーリーも知らなかった。
The opera was performed in Italian, and I did not understand a word of it, (the story / I / did / know / nor).
problems.rawAnswer: nor did I know the story
problems.ja: そのオペラはイタリア語で公演され，私には一言もわからなかったし，そのストーリーも知らなかった。
problems.answer: nor did I know the story
problems.en: The opera was performed in Italian, and I did not understand a word of it, nor did I know the story.

problems.question: "I haven't been here before."　"Is that so? (　　)."
problems.ja: 「ここには今まで来たことがない」「そうですか？ 私もありません」
problems.en: "I haven't been here before."　"Is that so? Neither have I."

problems.question: "I didn't make any mistakes in the math quiz!"　"(　　) did I."
problems.ja: 「数学の小テストで１問もミスをしなかったぞ！」「僕もしなかったよ」
problems.en: "I didn't make any mistakes in the math quiz!"　"Nor did I."

problems.question: As fuel prices rose, bus companies raised their fares and (　　).
problems.ja: 燃料の価格が上がったので，バス会社は運賃を引き上げ，航空会社も同様にした。
problems.en: As fuel prices rose, bus companies raised their fares and so did the airlines.

problems.question:
先週の日曜日はとても天気が良かったので田舎にドライブに出かけた。
Last Sunday was (beautiful / day / that / we / a / so) took a drive in the country.
problems.rawAnswer: so beautiful a day that we
problems.ja: 先週の日曜日はとても天気が良かったので田舎にドライブに出かけた。
problems.answer: so beautiful a day that we
problems.en: Last Sunday was so beautiful a day that we took a drive in the country.

problems.question: Chopin (as / a / good / as / pianist / was) a composer.
problems.rawAnswer: was as good a pianist as
problems.ja: ショパンは優れた作曲家であり，同時にすばらしいピアニストでもあった。
problems.answer: was as good a pianist as
problems.en: Chopin was as good a pianist as a composer.

problems.question: It was much (　　) problem, so nobody was able to solve it.
problems.ja: それはあまりに難解な問題だったので，だれも解くことができなかった。
problems.en: It was much too difficult a problem, so nobody was able to solve it.

problems.question: I think he is (　　) teacher.
problems.ja: 彼はとても忍耐強い教師だと思います。
problems.en: I think he is such a patient teacher.

problems.question: My child leaves her toys all over the room and I have to pick (　　).
problems.ja: 子どもが部屋中におもちゃを放りっぱなしにするので，私が拾い集めないといけない。
problems.en: My child leaves her toys all over the room and I have to pick them up.

problems.question: Among the audience (　　) the President and her daughter.
problems.ja: 観客の中には大統領とその娘がいた。
problems.en: Among the audience were the President and her daughter.

problems.question: The lady is very quiet and doesn't speak unless (　　).
problems.ja: その女性はとても物静かで，話しかけられない限り，口をきくことはない。
problems.en: The lady is very quiet and doesn't speak unless spoken to.

problems.question: There are few mistakes, if (　　), in this long essay.
problems.ja: この長い作文には，たとえあるにしても，ほとんど間違いはない。
problems.en: There are few mistakes, if any, in this long essay.

problems.question: Mr. and Mrs. Thatcher seldom, if (　　), go out in the evening.
problems.ja: サッチャー夫妻は，たとえあるにしても，めったに夜は外出しない。
problems.en: Mr. and Mrs. Thatcher seldom, if ever, go out in the evening.

problems.question:
君に解いてもらいたいのは他でもなくこの問題なんだ。
It is this question (solve / I / to / you / want / that).
problems.rawAnswer: that I want you to solve
problems.ja: 君に解いてもらいたいのは他でもなくこの問題なんだ。
problems.answer: that I want you to solve
problems.en: It is this question that I want you to solve.

problems.question: It was because he was ill (　　) we gave up traveling.
problems.ja: 私たちが旅行をやめたのは，彼が病気だったからだ。
problems.en: It was because he was ill that we gave up traveling.

problems.question:
警察が到着したのは，事故があって２時間も経ってからでした。
It was (after / not / that / the accident / the police / two hours / until) arrived.
problems.rawAnswer: not until two hours after the accident that the police
problems.ja: 警察が到着したのは，事故があって２時間も経ってからでした。
problems.answer: not until two hours after the accident that the police
problems.en: It was not until two hours after the accident that the police arrived.

problems.question: (　　) you went into the room with?
problems.ja: その部屋にあなたと一緒に入った人はいったい誰だったのですか。
problems.en: Who was it that you went into the room with?

problems.question:
子どもたちが育つ世界は大人が創っている。
(adults / children / create / it is / the world / their / where / who) will grow up.
problems.rawAnswer: It is adults who create the world where their children
problems.ja: 子どもたちが育つ世界は大人が創っている。
problems.answer: It is adults who create the world where their children
problems.en: It is adults who create the world where their children will grow up.

problems.question:
私は，子どものころにピアノが弾けるようになれなかったことを，本当に悔やんでいます。
I (piano / do / learning / play / to / the / not / regret) when I was a child.
problems.rawAnswer: do regret not learning to play the piano
problems.ja: 私は，子どものころにピアノが弾けるようになれなかったことを，本当に悔やんでいます。
problems.answer: do regret not learning to play the piano
problems.en: I do regret not learning to play the piano when I was a child.

problems.question: What (　　) earth are you doing?
problems.ja: いったいあなたは何をしているのですか。
problems.en: What on earth are you doing?

problems.question:
これは私が買いたかった，まさにその本です。
This (book / the / is / I / wanted / that / buy / very / to).
problems.rawAnswer: is the very book that I wanted to buy
problems.ja: これは私が買いたかった，まさにその本です。
problems.answer: is the very book that I wanted to buy
problems.en: This is the very book that I wanted to buy.
